test.observation: Vitest reported 9 failing tests confined to known pre-existing failures in src/db/__tests__/schema.test.ts (8) and src/app/api/health-data/__tests__/route.test.ts (1), with src/db/__tests__/audit-immutability.test.ts skipped; no additional failing test files were introduced.

typecheck.observation: tsc --noEmit completed successfully with exit code 0.

lint.observation: next lint completed successfully with no warnings or errors.

blockingIssues.description: API-key scope enforcement is missing on annotation CRUD handlers, allowing API-key callers without required scopes to read/mutate annotation data.
Viewer annotation reads are not clamped to grant dataStart/dataEnd; metric filtering is applied, but date-range scoping can be bypassed.
Viewer date clamping from enforcePermissions is not applied to execution; route continues using requested date/time window instead of effective clamped bounds.
grant_token is parsed but not used to establish auth/scoping, so documented grant-token deep-link behavior is not implemented.
event_id-triggered annotation lookup checks owner userId but does not enforce viewer grant-window bounds, enabling out-of-range annotation disclosure.
Trend endpoint validates correlation pairs but always returns correlations: [], missing required correlation computation behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit API-route security checklist requiring API-key scope checks and viewer date-window clamping (including secondary lookups such as event_id) for all read/write handlers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Blocking authorization/scope defects were reported in annotation-crud-api, night-view-endpoint, and recovery-view-endpoint.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve scope contradiction for trend correlations: either remove VAL-TREND-005 from this milestone or remove 'correlations/trend detection are P1 off-limits' guidance for api-and-jobs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: trend-view-endpoint omitted correlations while feature contract maps it to VAL-TREND-005; review observed AGENTS vs validation-contract mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit pre-handoff verification checklist for auth scope/date clamping and align procedural requirements (manual curl, bun/npm command examples, followedProcedure signaling) with current repository practice.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews observed missing scope/clamp checks and repeated procedure-adherence mismatches in skillFeedback across completed features.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated TDD/procedure-adherence mismatch observations across multiple review reports.
Service teardown ambiguity around stopping shared postgres in multi-worker runs.
